children.heading: Conservation Area
children.label: 1 Conservation Area
children.text: The term “Conservation Area” means the Las Cienegas National Conservation Area established by section 460–3(a) of this title.ooo

children.heading: Acquisition Planning District
children.label: 2 Acquisition Planning District
children.text: The term “Acquisition Planning District” means the Sonoita Valley Acquisition Planning District established by section 460–1(a) of this title.ooo

children.heading: Management plan
children.label: 3 Management plan
children.text: The term “management plan” means the management plan for the Conservation Area.

children.heading: Public lands
children.label: 4 Public lands
children.text: The term “public lands” has the meaning given the term in , except that such term shall not include interest in lands not owned by the United States.section 1702(e) of title 43

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
